column2: Población Indígena de Colombia – Resultados del Censo Nacional de Población y Vivienda 2018
Población por pueblo indígena, CG 2005 - CNPV 2018
Departamento Administrativo Nacional de Estadística (DANE). Población Indígena de Colombia: Resultados del Censo Nacional de Población y Vivienda 2018. 16 September 2019.

This dataset represents indigenous people and whether they speak the native language of their own people. Rows represent Indigenous peoples (pueblos indígenas) reported in the DANE 2018 Census. These are official population counts by Indigenous people, not language speaker counts. The DANE publication does not provide population by individual language.
